author_identification.canonical_name_ar: إسماعيل بن عمر بن كثير القرشي الدمشقي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent historian, hadith scholar, and exegete of the 8th century AH, known for his comprehensive historical works and contributions to hadith and tafsir.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A major historical work covering history from the beginning of creation to the author's time, widely referenced in Islamic historiography.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the most important historical works in Islamic literature, known for its comprehensive coverage and integration of hadith and tafsir.
